ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company whose stock price is being recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "data_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data provider for this stock price record */,
  "data_retrieval_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was retrieved from the data provider */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the prices are denominated (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "is_adjusted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the prices are adjusted for splits and dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_data_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_provider_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("data_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorite_companies" (
  "favorite_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite company record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the company as a favorite */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that was marked as a favorite */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the company was added to the user's favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorite_companies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorite_companies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date on which the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, system maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "data_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data provider */,
  "data_provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used to access the data provider's API */,
  "base_url" TEXT /* Base URL of the data provider's API */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data provider (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Last date when data was synchronized from the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_provider_id")
)
